name: hybrid_torus_scaleup_df_scaleout
_comment: Hybrid topology demo (switching.md §10): 8 pods × 4096 chips = 32768 devices. Scale-up `ici` is the TPU v5p 16×16×16 ICI torus (intra-pod); scale-out `slingshot` is a small inter-pod dragonfly (p=2, a=2, h=2, g=2) — chosen to exercise all three dragonfly tiers; non-canonical g (canonical balanced would be g = a·h + 1 = 5). Group sizes ≤4096 stay inside ici and route through torus primitives; larger G escalates into slingshot. Mixed-topology chains currently warn+fall-back to the crossbar-flatten bound (dispatch.py Phase D note); the precise hierarchical hybrid cost is deferred to a future phase.
